## Agent rules

1. **Click+shot green ≠ visual PASS** — open each new screenshot before handoff.
2. Update `visual` / `note` fields in `visual-audit-checklist.json` after eye-check.
3. Log run in `docs/playtests/AGENT_RUNS.md` (AR-NNN).
